steps.title: Substitute to simplify the system
steps.content:
The expressions $(x - 2)$ and $(y + 3)$ appear in both equations. Let $u = x - 2$ and $v = y + 3$ to simplify. The system becomes:
$$u - 8v = 123$$$$u + 8v = 432$$

steps.title: Add equations to eliminate v
steps.content:
The $8v$ terms have opposite signs, so adding the equations eliminates them:
$$(u - 8v) + (u + 8v) = 123 + 432$$$$2u = 555$$$$u = 277.5$$

steps.title: Calculate 10(x - 2)
steps.content:
Since $u = x - 2$, the requested value is $10(x - 2) = 10u$. Substituting $u = 277.5$:
$$10(x - 2) = 10 \times 277.5 = 2775$$
